title: Building the Participation Layer for On-Chain AI & Quant Trading — Introducing ALGOXEN ($AGX)
author: Extra-Compote7143
selftext:
Hey everyone,

We’ve spent the last 5+ years building quantitative trading infrastructure focused on crypto markets, systematic execution, and risk-managed capital allocation.

Now we’re launching something bigger:

ALGOXEN ($AGX) — a project focused on bringing transparent, non-custodial access to quantitative trading strategies on-chain.

What we’re building:  
• Systematic trading infrastructure  
• Non-custodial vault-based execution  
• Risk-managed capital allocation  
• On-chain transparency for performance & rewards

Instead of “yield farming,” the goal is to create a sustainable participation layer where capital is allocated into real trading infrastructure and strategy vaults.

Current stack includes:  
• Arbitrum deployment  
• Hyperliquid vault infrastructure  
• USDC-based reward mechanisms  
• Staking & participation model via AGX

We recently launched the $AGX pre-sale, and Tier 1 is currently live for a limited time.

Would genuinely love feedback from the AI + trading community:

* What do you think is missing in current on-chain quant trading platforms?
* What would make you trust an AI/quant allocation protocol long term?
* What kind of transparency metrics matter most to you?

🌐 Website: [https://algoxen.com](https://algoxen.com)
